name: Spinach Yogurt Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 (10 oz each) Frozen Chopped Spinach, thawed but not drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3 quart saucepan, sauté onion in butter until soft but not brown.
2. Mix in flour, salt, tarragon, nutmeg, and cayenne. Cook until bubbly.
3. Add spinach, then broth. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 15 minutes.
4. Place the mixture into a blender, about one-third at a time (I used a hand blender right in the pot). Puree until smooth.
5. Return the pureed soup to the saucepan. Add yogurt, whisking until smooth and blended.
6. Heat just until steaming. Do not boil. Adjust salt if needed.
7. Serve with a lemon slice on top of each serving.
